name: awesome-agent-team
description: Spawn a unique multi-agent team with randomized English names, personalities, and speaking styles. Features a Visionary Leader who brainstorms your goals and assembles the perfect team using Claude Code's native Agent Teams.

plugins.name: awesome-agent-team
plugins.description: Multi-agent team orchestration with randomized personalities. 400+ names, 20 personas, 12 roles. Includes a Visionary Leader that brainstorms your goals before deploying a native Agent Team via TeammateTool.
